about.title: Florencia Segovia
about.credentials: Argentinian Ski Instructor · Lawyer · WFR Certified · Skydiver & Climber
about.bio: Off the snow, I'm a lawyer, skydiver, and climber. They're not separate worlds to me — in all of them, I read risk, stay calm, and help you progress. My method comes from that mix of discipline and passion.

offPiste.title: Off-Piste
offPiste.text: Terrain, snowpack, and weather read before every run. WFR and lawyer's mindset for every descent.

kids.title: Kids
kids.text: Real skills via games. Confidence first, risk never. Every child progresses at their own pace.

safety.title: Always a Plan
safety.text: You'll always know the plan. Clear, shared safety logic — no surprises on the mountain.

approach.title: Patient & Technical
approach.text: Patient, technical, serene. No shouting. Just progression, step by step.

private.title: Private Lesson
private.description: One-on-one instruction fully tailored to your level and goals. The most effective way to progress.

kids.title: Kids Lesson
kids.description: Fun, safe progression for children of all ages. Skills built through games and gentle challenges.

offPiste.title: Off-Piste & Backcountry
offPiste.description: Expert guidance in untracked snow with full risk assessment before every run.

group.title: Group Lesson
group.description: Small groups, personalized attention, shared energy. Learn together, progress together.

booking.title: Check Availability
booking.subtitle: Select a date to see available time slots. Season runs December through February.
booking.noSlots: No availability on this date. Try another day.

form.name: Full Name

reviews.title: Real Trust, Earned One Lesson at a Time
